name: Detroit become human RPG
description: In the year 2038 Androids are common place, most people even owning one for themselves. However it seems the Androids have become discontent with the mistreatment and subjugation by humans and some even become "Deviants" Its your job as a Detective working for the DPD to stop them. You're even assigned a new case with Hank Anderson himself.
creator: LillyLovez
